zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Grey於1393年出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓時，他的父親Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton53歲，母親Elizabeth Talbot41歲。他於大約1409年與Blanche de la Vache在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1442年8月13日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾布萊利享年49歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾布萊利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Grey于1393年出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton53岁，母亲Elizabeth Talbot41岁。他于大约1409年与Blanche de la Vache在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1442年8月13日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾布萊利享年49岁，埋葬在英国巴金哈姆爾布萊利。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Grey was born in 1393, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, his father, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, was 53 and his mother, Elizabeth Talbot, was 41. He married Blanche de la Vache about 1409, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 August 1442, in Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Grey est né en 1393, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Talbot, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de la Vache environ 1409, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 août 1442, à Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Greyが1393年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wiltonは53歳，母Elizabeth Talbotは41歳であった。約1409年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでBlanche de la Vacheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1442年8月13日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアブレトチリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスブクインガムシュアイアブレトチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Grey(이)가 1393년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Talbot(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Blanche de la Vache(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 8월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 블레트클리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 블레트클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Grey nasceu em 1393, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Talbot, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de la Vache aproximadamente 1409, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de agosto de 1442, em Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Grey родился в 1393 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Grey 5th Baron of Wilton было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Talbot, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de la Vache около 1409 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 августа 1442 г. в местности блечли, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности блечли, буккингхамшир, Англия.

Se casó con Blanche de la Vache aproximadamente 1409, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de agosto de 1442, en Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Bletchley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra.
